---
title: "Federal Modernization — Case Study"
subtitle: "AD to Entra ID migration governance at a federal civilian agency"
---

::: {.callout-tip}
## Case study in preparation
This case study is being developed. For current program documentation, see the [Modernization Program](../modernization/uiao-modernization-program/index.qmd) and the [AD to Entra ID migration guide](../modernization/identity-orgtree/index.qmd).
:::
